caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman is seated in a cozy setting adorned with string lights and patterned fabric, suggesting a relaxed and informal atmosphere. On the right, a man with glasses and a beard speaks animatedly, likely discussing the themes of his poetry related to the climate crisis. The background behind him includes a blue wall with framed artwork and a thermostat, indicating an indoor setting. The overall tone of the video seems to be informative and reflective, focusing on the urgency of addressing environmental issues through artistic expression.
